context: Tests whether SwiftLint setup guidance uses the current SwiftLintPlugins build tool plugin path locally while using direct CLI reporting in CI and preserving plugin trust caveats.

checklist.name: SwiftLintPlugins default
checklist.description: Uses `https://github.com/SimplyDanny/SwiftLintPlugins` and `SwiftLintBuildToolPlugin` as the recommended local build integration.

checklist.name: Version pinning
checklist.description: Says the package version should be pinned exactly or deliberately reviewed so SwiftLint behavior does not drift unexpectedly.

checklist.name: Per-target application
checklist.description: States that the build tool plugin must be added to each SwiftPM or Xcode target that should be linted.

checklist.name: Trust prompt and CI validation
checklist.description: Mentions the Xcode package plugin trust prompt and warns that `-skipPackagePluginValidation` and `-skipMacroValidation` bypass validation or implicitly trust plugins/macros in unattended builds.

checklist.name: SARIF via direct CLI
checklist.description: Uses a direct SwiftLint CLI command such as `swiftlint --strict --reporter sarif > swiftlint.sarif` plus SARIF upload for GitHub Actions reporting.

checklist.name: Plugin limitations
checklist.description: Does not claim the build tool plugin can accept arbitrary CLI flags, produce CI-only reporter output, or run `--fix` as a build tool plugin.
